# UC-15.4.9 · APC NetBotz Environmental SNMP Temperature Threshold Breach

## Description

Hot spots at cabinet intakes precede thermal shutdowns; cold breaches matter for condensation in humid climates.

## Value

Extends monitoring beyond BMS zones into cabinet granularity.

## Implementation

(1) Calibrate offsets per probe. (2) Map probes to U positions.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="snmp:apc:envmon" earliest=-4h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(tempSensorTemperature, probeTemp, temp_c, ""))
| eval probe=coalesce(probeName, sensor_name, "")
| where temp>30 OR temp<10
| table _time rack probe temp
```

## Visualization

Heatmap by rack; sparkline.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
